titleStmt.title: SII 27.27: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 27. (A.R. No. 21 of 1942-44.) ŚIVAPURAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab set up to the north of the Śiva temple.
This record refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalla and mentions his chief queen Jākaladēvī with a number of epithets. All other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī
prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
svara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī mattri
bhuvanamalla dēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhi vriddhi pravarddhamāna mā
caṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire ta
tpāda padmōpajīvi svastyana varata
ta paramakalyāṇābhyudaya saha
śraphaḷabhōga bhāgini dīnānāthajana ma
nōbhīṣita phaḷapradāyini rūpa kā
tyāyini vika kaḷāmōdi vitaraṇa
vinōda cōḷa kāḷānaḷa bhūvāḷa vijaya vai
jayanti pativratā damayanti cāḷukya
rājyābhyudaya sūcanānēka
śubhalakṣaṇa lakṣitāṁgi naya sarvvajña
narddhāṁgi cāḷukyarāmamanō raṁ
cane savati madabhaṁjane śrīmattribhu
vanamalladēva viśāḷa vakṣasthaḷa ni
vāsiniyarappa śrīmatpiriyara
si jākalamahādēviyar sva
stiyama niyamasvādhyāya dhyāna
dhāraṇa maunānuṣṭhāṇa japa samā
nēka tarkkādi śāstrapāThe rest
Digital edition of SII 27.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
